ん……あれ？ うち、いつの間にか寝ちゃってた……？: Mm... huh? I fell asleep without noticing...?
着衣の乱れを正したレヴィエーヌが、ベッドに腰かけて寄り添ってくる。<br>あの後:
Levienne fixed her disheveled clothes and sat on the bed beside him.
After that, the 'lesson' had continued until she was satisfied.
そして、レッスンの疲労でいつの間にか２人ともベッドに崩れ落ち、<br>そのままし:
Exhausted from the ordeal, they had both collapsed
onto the bed and dozed off together.
俺も途中から記憶がないんだがな……。<br>で……どうだ？ 何か掴めたのか？:
I blacked out partway through myself...
So... how'd it go? Did you learn anything?
ううん。<br>はぁ……結局、あの人みたいな腰使いは身に付かなかったな……:
Nope.
Haah... I still couldn't get hip moves like hers in the end...
……ダンスのテクニックって、一夜漬けで簡単に身に付くもんなのか？<br>レヴィエ:
...Can you really learn a dance technique in one night?
Your dancing took years to develop, didn't it?
……それもそうね。<br>あの人も毎晩続けて身に付けたって言ってたもの。:
...Good point.
She did say she kept it up every night to learn it.
だろ？ 毎晩続けて――<br>え……？ 毎晩！？:
Right? Keep at it every night——
Wait...? Every night!?
あんたは前の大会でも手伝ってくれたし、<br>もちろん今回の特訓にも付き合ってく:
You helped me with the last contest too,
so of course you'll help with this training, right?
はぁっ！？ おいおい、さすがに毎晩は勘弁してくれよ……: Huh!? Come on, every single night is a bit much...
しかしレヴィエーヌはこちらの服の袖を握ったまま満面の笑顔を見せる。<br>この日:
But Levienne just beamed, still gripping his sleeve. Needless to say,
he was roped into intense nightly training from then on.
